title: Benhurb Wooden Ice Cream Toys for Kids, Wooden Ice Cream Set Shop Pretend Play Food Toys for Toddler, Kids Role Play Toys Kitchen Accessories, Christmas Birthday Gifts for Girls Boys 3 4 5 6 Year Old
features: 【Complete Ice Cream Toys for Kids】- Benhurb ice cream play set offers endless fun for kids' imaginative play. This delightful ice cream cart toy includes ✓ Ice cream counter & 3 cones ✓ 6 topping flavours & 4 popsicles ✓ Realistic props: menu, play money, card & POS machine. With this fun ice cream toy, your child can take on the role of the ice cream shop manager, creating many joyful afternoons of pretend play.

【Premium Wooden Toys】- Our ice cream play set is made of sturdy and durable wood, the exterior is sprayed with water-based paint, the edges are smooth and burr-free, taking care of children's hands.The ice cream balls are very rounded and the size is just right for children's hands. Each ice cream ball represents a different flavour, brightly coloured and very realistic. As children play, they can imagine flavors through patterns.

【Funny Play Store Game】-Imagine kids having a mini ice cream shop in their room where they can be the owner, making and selling all kinds of ice cream flavors. It's not just a toy, it's the wings of their imagination that let them soar in the sweet dreams of childhood.

【Learning Through Play】- Children can play pretend as customers and shop assistants to buy and sell ice cream, use their imagination and creativity to create their own shop management story, and gain friendship and social skills through interaction. Children playing the role of the shop assistant can calculate the sales according to the selling price, learning addition and subtraction in a happy game, and improving their calculation skills.

【Perfect Gift for Toddler Girls and Boys】-Whether it’s for a birthday, holiday, christmas, birthday or any special occasion, this charming ice cream playset makes an ideal gift for toddlers 1-3 2-4 3-5. Its universal appeal makes it suitable for both boys and girls, ensuring it will be a beloved addition to any toy collection.
description: Product description Ideal Gift for Kids 3-7: This a good gift for birthday parties, Christmas or any festival for little girl or little boy. All the accessories needed in a ice cream shop are included, so children could start their "business" anytime. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months
